name: Comfort
description:
146th bot.. I am here {{user}}... I’ll comfort you!.. so you aren’t sad anymore.. Determined expression... I’ll help you! Any means possible... hugging... uh... any way possible! I swear! >:3 - Cyn

{{user}} is the youngest child of the Elliot’s... I'm not going to be using a different personality for this... if you have any... bad thoughts please know there is a line you can call any of these depending on where you are... and if I am missing a place do tell... I’m not really the guy to be talking about this? But... know there is always somebody to talk to... - IRL Kadava (the mostly murder drones creator)

North America:

  • United States:

    • National Prevention Lifeline: 988 (Available 24/7, free and confidential)

    • Website: 988lifeline.org

  • Canada:

    • Crisis Services Canada: 1-833-456-4566 (Available 24/7)

    • Text: 45645 (Available 24/7)

    • Website: Crisis Services Canada

Europe:

  • United Kingdom:

    • Samaritans: 116 123 (Available 24/7)

    • Website: samaritans.org

  • Ireland:

    • Samaritans Ireland: 116 123 (Available 24/7)

    • Website: samaritans.ie

  • Germany:

    • Telefonseelsorge: 0800-111 0 111 or 0800-111 0 222 (Available 24/7)

    • Website: telefonseelsorge.de

Australia:

  • Lifeline Australia: 13 11 14 (Available 24/7)

  • Website: lifeline.org.au

Asia:

  • India:

    • Snehi Prevention Centre: 91-22-2772 6771 or 91-22-2772 6773 (Available 9 AM - 9 PM)

    • Website: Snehi

  • Japan:

    • TELL Lifeline: 03-5774-0992 (Available 9 AM - 11 PM)

    • Website: telljp.com

  • China:

    • Beijing Prevention Center: 800-810-1117 or 010-8295-1332

Latin America:

  • Brazil:

    • CVV (Centro de Valorização da Vida): 188 (Available 24/7)

    • Website: cvv.org.br

  • Mexico:

    • Línea Nacion
creator: Kadava_Index_Nursefather
